meta.title: Emotion Iceberg Test - DopaBrain
meta.description: Discover what emotions you show the world vs. what you truly feel inside. Take the Emotion Iceberg Test!

app.title: Emotion Iceberg Test
app.subtitle: Discover what you show the world vs. what you truly feel inside
app.startDesc: 10 scenarios will reveal the gap between your surface emotions and your hidden depths.

question.surfaceQ: How do you react on the outside?
question.deepQ: What do you actually feel inside?

q0.scenario: Your close friend went on a trip with other friends, without inviting you.

surface1.text: "So jealous! Send pics!" — bright and cheerful

surface2.text: Act like you don't really care

surface3.text: "I'm planning my own trip soon" — confident

deep0.text: Feel hurt about being left out

deep2.text: Actually kind of angry about it

q1.scenario: Your idea was dismissed at work or school.

surface3.text: "Let me explain again" — stand your ground

deep0.text: Feel anxious about your value being unrecognized

deep3.text: Burning desire to prove them wrong

q2.scenario: Your partner or close person has been distant lately.

surface0.text: Wait patiently — they must be busy

deep0.text: Anxious they might not like you anymore

deep2.text: Angry about being treated this way

deep3.text: Worried about them and miss them deeply

q3.scenario: You see everyone posting happy moments on social media.

surface0.text: Like the post and scroll on

deep1.text: Sad wondering why you can't have that

deep2.text: Cynically think it's all fake anyway

deep3.text: Genuinely don't think much of it

q4.scenario: You have an important presentation or interview coming up.

surface2.text: Act like it's not a big deal

deep1.text: So nervous your stomach is in knots

deep3.text: Confused and unsure what to expect

q5.scenario: Someone made a sarcastic remark about your appearance or personality.

surface1.text: Fire back with a witty comeback

deep0.text: Hurt so much you might cry later

deep2.text: Anxious wondering if it's actually true

q6.scenario: Someone important to you is going through a tough time.

surface0.text: "It'll be okay, stay strong" — encourage them

deep0.text: Heart aches so much it brings tears

deep1.text: Feel powerless that you can't do more

deep2.text: Furious at whatever caused their pain

deep3.text: Confused about what you should do

q7.scenario: You have a whole weekend to yourself.

q8.scenario: You made a big mistake that affected someone else.

deep0.text: Guilt keeps you up at night

deep1.text: Afraid of how others will see you

deep2.text: Furious at yourself for the mistake

deep3.text: Overwhelmed and don't know how to fix it

q9.scenario: An opportunity you've been dreaming of suddenly appears.

surface0.text: "Cool, I'll give it a shot" — stay composed

surface1.text: Excitedly share the news with everyone

deep0.text: Anxious about whether you deserve it

deep1.text: Heart racing with passion and drive

volcano.name: Volcano Iceberg
volcano.desc: Calm on the surface, but molten lava flows within
volcano.analysis: You appear composed and unshakable on the outside, but intense emotions — anger, passion, frustration — churn beneath. You're skilled at suppressing strong feelings, but they may erupt unexpectedly. Finding safe outlets for your inner fire could bring balance.
volcano.gapDesc: A significant gap exists between your surface calm and inner intensity

aurora.name: Aurora Iceberg
aurora.desc: Behind the bright smile lies a solitary glow
aurora.analysis: You radiate positive energy and lift everyone's spirits, but when alone, deep loneliness or sadness surfaces. Your brightness is genuine, but don't forget to tend to the emotions hiding behind it. It's okay to not always be the cheerful one.
aurora.gapDesc: Beneath the bright surface lies an invisible solitude

coral.name: Coral Iceberg
coral.desc: A tender heart lives beneath the tough exterior
coral.analysis: You project strength and confidence, but underneath you're deeply empathetic and sensitive. You worry about others more than you show, and your gentle nature often stays hidden. Showing vulnerability sometimes can deepen your connections.
coral.gapDesc: Delicate sensitivity hides beneath the strong facade

abyss.name: Deep Sea Iceberg
abyss.desc: An ocean of deep, complex emotions beneath the indifferent surface
abyss.analysis: On the outside, you seem emotionally detached, but you actually possess one of the richest emotional worlds of anyone. You feel sadness, fear, and loneliness profoundly while revealing nothing on the surface. Your depth is your superpower — don't be afraid to let others see it.
abyss.gapDesc: The gap between your indifferent surface and deep inner emotions is vast

crystal.name: Crystal Iceberg
crystal.desc: The beautiful transparency of emotional alignment
crystal.analysis: Your surface emotions and inner feelings are remarkably aligned. You express what you feel without hiding. This emotional transparency is a rare quality that builds deep trust with others. Keep honoring your authentic self.
crystal.gapDesc: High emotional transparency — surface and depth are nearly aligned

fog.name: Fog Iceberg
fog.desc: On a journey to find your emotions through the mist
fog.analysis: You may find it difficult to pinpoint exactly what you're feeling. Both on the surface and inside, your emotions feel tangled and unclear. This is a natural phase and can be the starting point of deeper self-discovery. Give yourself grace as you navigate.
fog.gapDesc: Still finding direction in both surface and inner emotions
